title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 24 - 2017: 20 kilometer diameters

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a stressful visit to his mother who scolded him about not making money and pressed him to start earning; he commits to starting bike riding by April 15th as a way to monetize his content. He also gives a progress update on his website project involving geographic circle/bubble area dimensions and a Rome timeline, and mentions listening to 'Wealth of Nations' and 'Dark Money'.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feels pressured by his mom but agrees to commit to a plan by April 15th rather than act immediately
got genuinely excited about it as a plan once pushed, sees it as tied to Patreon and other monetization
would try Walmart as a last resort and make a public issue of being denied for being a stoner
gets complaints but doesn't care and uses them anyway because it reflects his current work

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got up really late today after working until 2 AM and got 10 hours of sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom wanted him to help her at her house, but he thinks she mainly just wanted to talk to him.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom yelled at him for not making money and needing to make money right away.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom was going to give him $4,000 today, and he had borrowed $11,600 from her this winter until he sold his car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He felt bad because his mom is 35 years old and he didn't want her to have a heart attack.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He told his mom he would start riding his bike on April 15th to make money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was excited about biking because he felt really bad physically and was feeling horrible earlier tonight.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is working on his bubbles and 25 area dimensions page and hopes to finish it this weekend.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After finishing the bubbles, he plans to work on the Rome page and create a parody timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to finish writing his intro and the bike racer levels on his page before he starts riding his bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has a long-term plan to make money, including potentially getting a job at Walmart if biking doesn't work out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finished making movies of the circles and is now making the circles from level 1 to 8.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is renaming the levels on Google Earth and plans to do screen captures and upload them to his website and YouTube.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was listening to 'Wealth of Nations' by Adam Smith for the last couple of days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom bought him a book called 'Dark Money' about the secret history of billionaires taking over America with lobbyists.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to memorize 'Dark Money' and write a page about it after he starts riding his bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wonders if it's possible to type and ride a bike at the same time and thinks whoever does that is a superhero.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is using 20Ks as the background for his videos despite complaints.
